name: Nginx Proxy Manager
description: Reverse proxy with web UI and automatic Let's Encrypt SSL. Route traffic to your services with pretty URLs.

commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl ca-certificates gnupg
apt-get update && apt-get install -y docker-ce docker-ce-cli containerd.io docker-compose-plugin

mkdir -p /opt/npm && cat > /opt/npm/docker-compose.yml << 'EOF'
services:
  npm:
    image: jc21/nginx-proxy-manager:latest
    restart: always
    ports:
      - '80:80'
      - '443:443'
      - '81:81'
    volumes:
      - ./data:/data
      - ./letsencrypt:/etc/letsencrypt
EOF
post_create.notes: Admin UI at http://CONTAINER_IP:81. Default login: admin@example.com / changeme
